2604.25665.title: LLM-ReSum: A Framework for LLM Reflective Summarization through Self-Evaluation
2604.25665.paper_summary: Reliable evaluation of large language model (LLM)-generated summaries remains an open challenge, particularly across heterogeneous domains and document lengths. We conduct a comprehensive meta-evaluation of 14 automatic summarization metrics and LLM-based evaluators across seven datasets spanning five domains, covering documents from short news articles to long scientific, governmental, and legal texts (2K-27K words) with over 1,500 human-annotated summaries. Our results show that traditional lexical overlap metrics (e.g., ROUGE, BLEU) exhibit weak or negative correlation with human judgments, while task-specific neural metrics and LLM-based evaluators achieve substantially higher alignment, especially for linguistic quality assessment. Leveraging these findings, we propose LLM-ReSum, a self-reflective summarization framework that integrates LLM-based evaluation and generation in a closed feedback loop without model finetuning. Across three domains, LLM-ReSum improves low-quality summaries by up to 33% in factual accuracy and 39% in coverage, with human evaluators preferring refined summaries in 89% of cases. We additionally introduce PatentSumEval, a new human-annotated benchmark for legal document summarization comprising 180 expert-evaluated summaries. All code and datasets will be released in GitHub.
2604.25665.paper_summary_zh: 可靠評估大型語言模型（LLM）生成的摘要仍然是一個未解的挑戰，特別是在異質領域和文檔長度方面。<lb/>我們對14種自動摘要指標和基於LLM的評估器進行了全面的元評估，涵蓋了七個數據集，跨越五個領域，涵蓋從短新聞文章到長篇科學、政府和法律文本（2K-27K字）的文檔，並擁有超過1,500個人類標註的摘要。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，傳統的詞彙重疊指標（例如ROUGE、BLEU）與人類評價之間的相關性較弱或為負，而特定任務的神經指標和基於LLM的評估器則實現了顯著更高的一致性，特別是在語言質量評估方面。<lb/>基於這些發現，我們提出了LLM-ReSum，一個自我反思的摘要框架，該框架在不進行模型微調的情況下，將基於LLM的評估和生成整合在一個閉環反饋中。<lb/>在三個領域中，LLM-ReSum在事實準確性上提高了多達33%的低質量摘要，在覆蓋率上提高了39%，人類評估者在89%的案例中更喜歡精煉的摘要。<lb/>我們還介紹了PatentSumEval，這是一個針對法律文檔摘要的新的人類標註基準，包含180個專家評估的摘要。<lb/>所有代碼和數據集將在GitHub上發布。
2604.25665.author: Huyen Nguyen et.al.
2604.25665.authors: Huyen Nguyen, Haoxuan Zhang, Yang Zhang, Junhua Ding, Haihua Chen
